headline: Is eBay Inc. (EBAY) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is EBAY a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on eBay Inc. on Rijnberk InvestInsights’s Substack by Daan | InvestInsights. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on EBAY. eBay Inc.’s share was trading at $107.13 as of April 20th. EBAY’s trailing and forward P/E were 24.57 and 17.79 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. eBay presents […]
